title: rubus × lapicidinarum
intro: Rubus × lapicidinarum, a hybrid species of the raspberry plant, is a type of bramble native to the European region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus × lapicidinarum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
